x-enumeration-literals.name: Transaction-Based Incentive Accrual
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Incentives are earned per individual transaction.

Comment:
Example: Earn 1 point for every purchase.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Volume-Based Incentive Accrual
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Incentives are based on the total value or volume of activity.

Comment:
Example: Earn 1% cashback on total monthly spending.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Time-Based Incentive Accrual
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Incentives accrue over time based on duration or holding period.

Comment:
Example: Interest-like rewards for maintaining a balance.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tiered Incentive Accrual
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Accrual rates vary based on predefined tiers or levels.

Comment
Example: Higher spending leads to higher points per transaction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Threshold-Based Incentive Accrual
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Incentives are accrued only after reaching a minimum level.

Comment:
Example: Earn rewards only after spending €500.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Event-Based Incentive Accrual
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Incentives are earned when specific events occur.

Comment:
Example: Bonus points for signing up or referring a friend.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Progressive Incentive Accrual
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Accrual increases progressively as activity grows.

Comment:
Example: The more you spend, the higher the reward rate.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fixed Incentive Accrual
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A fixed amount of incentive is earned regardless of activity size.

Comment:
Example: Earn 10 points per transaction, no matter the amount.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Conditional Incentive Accrual
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Incentives accrue only if certain conditions are met.

Comment:
Example: Rewards earned only if minimum balance is maintained.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Capped Incentive Accrual
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Accrual is limited up to a maximum value.

Comment:
Example: Cashback capped at €100 per month.
